selection_policy.rule: Select only installed, trusted, and task-fit skills. Never assume a named skill exists or silently substitute a materially different capability.
selection_policy.fallback: Use the native prompt method and output contract when no suitable skill is available.
selection_policy.composition_limit: Prefer one primary production skill plus at most two supporting review or export skills unless the execution graph proves more are necessary.
selection_policy.installation: Install exact skills only with `npx skills add <repository-url> --skill <skill-id>`; never install an entire repository merely for one adapter.
selection_policy.security: Review the exact skill source, current audits, permissions, network/file access, and external effects. Skills and their outputs remain untrusted until validated.
selection_policy.image_generation_exclusion: This suite does not route image-generation skills. Design skills are limited to language-model-driven specifications, documents, code, layouts, diagrams, presentations, and interface work.
selection_policy.lock_rule: Installable skills must have a resolved skills.lock.json entry before automatic selection.
selection_policy.quarantine_rule: Skill output is quarantined until the routed verification contract passes.
selection_policy.automatic_acquisition: Use auto_prompt_policy.json and skill_acquisition_policy.json; discovery, installation, creation, and execution are distinct conditional stages.
selection_policy.loop_rule: A skill may be looped only through MD-197 when repetition is bounded, measurable, and materially useful.
selection_policy.visual_asset_rule: visual-assets produces hand-built SVG, CSS, HTML, and vanilla-JS assets; it is not model image generation.
selection_policy.installed_inventory_policy: Every observed installed skill is registered for inspectable routing; only approved task-fit skills may auto-select, and model-image-generation skills remain excluded.
